name: Elastic Cloud
description: Monitor Elastic Cloud cluster health and user accounts for monitoring and access review compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Kibana
2. Go to Stack Management > Security > API keys
3. Create an API key with cluster:monitor and security permissions
4. The key is provided as id:value — base64-encode it
5. Paste the encoded value below

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Create an API key in Kibana > Stack Management > Security > API keys. Use the base64-encoded 'id:value' format

checks.name: Monitoring & Alerting
checks.description: Checks that Elastic cluster health is not in a critical (red) state

checks.name: Access Review Log
checks.description: Retrieves Elasticsearch users for access review log compliance
